title: Stylei'n By Monny
description: A comprehensive full-stack e-commerce application for clothing and apparel.
longDescription: Cloth eCommerce is a robust full-stack web application built using the MERN stack. It offers a seamless shopping experience for users to browse clothing items, add them to a cart, and securely checkout. The backend handles inventory management and user authentication.

title: AI Assistance Assignment
description: An AI-powered code review and assignment assistance tool built with TypeScript and React.
longDescription: This application leverages AI to provide automated code reviews and assignment feedback. Built with TypeScript for type safety, the React frontend communicates with a Node.js backend to process user submissions and return intelligent, context-aware suggestions.

title: Phoenix Dev Labs
description: A professional agency website with a dedicated backend for managing services and client inquiries.
longDescription: Phoenix Dev Labs serves as a dynamic agency portfolio and service management platform. Built with React and Node.js, it showcases company services and projects while featuring a secure backend dashboard to handle client messages and service requests.

title: materials.store
description: A modern e-commerce platform built with the MERN stack featuring advanced state management.
longDescription: ARC eCommerce is an advanced online storefront offering full e-commerce capabilities. From browsing products to managing orders, the platform ensures high performance and reliability through its React frontend and scalable Express/MongoDB backend.

title: eBook
description: eBook is a comprehensive MERN stack e-commerce platform supporting physical product sales, digital eBook sales, affiliate marketing system, coupon/promo codes, and multiple payment gateway integrations (SSLCommerz, bKash, Nagad). Features mobile-based OTP authentication, secure PDF reading with watermarking, and a complete admin dashboard with analytics.
longDescription:
eBook is a full-featured e-commerce platform built with React 18, Redux Toolkit, and Tailwind CSS for the frontend, and Node.js, Express.js, and MongoDB for the backend. The platform enables customers to browse and purchase both physical products and digital eBooks with advanced filtering, search, and pagination capabilities.

The platform includes a comprehensive shopping cart system with persistent storage, coupon/promo code support, and multiple payment gateway integrations including SSLCommerz, bKash, and Nagad. The eBook reading system features secure PDF serving with IP restriction, device fingerprinting, and PDF watermarking for content protection.

The affiliate marketing system allows users to register as affiliates, generate referral links, track commissions, and request withdrawals. The admin dashboard provides real-time analytics, sales reports, user management, product management, order management, affiliate management, and commission tracking.

The application supports multi-language (English and Bangla), dark/light mode with system preference detection, and is fully responsive with a mobile-first design approach. The backend follows a 3-layer architecture (Presentation, Business Logic, Data Access) for maintainability and scalability.
features: Full E-commerce Platform with Physical & Digital Products
Secure eBook Reading with IP/Device Restrictions & Watermarking
Affiliate Marketing System with Commission Tracking & Withdrawals

featuresDescribe.title: Product Management
featuresDescribe.detail: Complete product catalog with physical and digital products, category and subcategory support, advanced search and filtering, stock management, featured products, and product image galleries. Products can be browsed with pagination, sorting, and category filtering.

featuresDescribe.title: Shopping Cart & Checkout
featuresDescribe.detail: Persistent shopping cart with quantity management, coupon/promo code application, real-time price calculation, address selection/creation, multiple payment gateway support (SSLCommerz, bKash, Nagad), and order confirmation system.

featuresDescribe.title: Secure eBook System
featuresDescribe.detail: Secure PDF viewer with IP restriction, device fingerprinting, PDF watermarking, access token management, and reading progress tracking. eBooks are protected against unauthorized access and distribution.

featuresDescribe.title: Affiliate Program
featuresDescribe.detail: Complete affiliate marketing system with referral link generation, commission tracking, withdrawal request system, performance analytics dashboard, and affiliate profile management. Affiliates can track their referrals and earnings.

featuresDescribe.title: Admin Dashboard
featuresDescribe.detail: Comprehensive admin panel with real-time analytics, sales reports, user management, product management, order management, affiliate management, commission approval system, withdraw request management, and data visualization with charts and graphs.

featuresDescribe.title: Multi-Language & Theme Support
featuresDescribe.detail: Full internationalization support for English and Bangla (বাংলা) with dynamic language switching. Dark and light mode with system preference detection, theme persistence, and smooth transitions.

featuresDescribe.title: Mobile-Based OTP Authentication
featuresDescribe.detail: Secure authentication system using mobile number and OTP verification. JWT token-based session management with refresh token support, role-based access control, and protected routes.

error.solution: Implemented proper separation of concerns with Presentation Layer (Routes + Controllers), Business Logic Layer (Services), and Data Access Layer (Models + Repositories) for maintainability and scalability.
Implemented IP restriction, device fingerprinting, and PDF watermarking using PDF.js library. Created secure access token system with expiration and validation for protected PDF viewing.
Created unified payment service layer to handle SSLCommerz, bKash, and Nagad integrations. Implemented payment verification, callback handling, and error handling for all payment methods.
Implemented Redux Toolkit with proper slice structure, async thunks for API calls, and state normalization. Used proper memoization to prevent unnecessary re-renders and optimize performance.

Integrated i18next with react-i18next for translation management. Created translation files for English and Bangla, implemented language detection, and dynamic language switching with localStorage persistence.

title: CourseMaster
description: CourseMaster is a modern E-learning platform where students can browse, purchase, and consume courses. The full-stack application provides an intuitive interface for students to enroll in courses, watch video lectures, complete assignments, and take quizzes. Administrators can manage courses, track enrollments, review assignments, and view analytics through a dedicated admin dashboard.
longDescription:
CourseMaster is a comprehensive E-learning platform built with React 19, Redux Toolkit, and Tailwind CSS for the frontend, and Node.js, Express.js, and MongoDB for the backend. The platform enables students to browse courses with advanced filtering, search, and sorting capabilities. Students can enroll in courses, watch video lectures integrated with YouTube, mark lessons as complete, track learning progress, submit assignments (text or Google Drive links), and take quizzes with immediate score feedback.

The admin dashboard provides comprehensive course management features including creating, updating, and deleting courses, adding detailed course syllabus with modules, lessons, videos, assignments, and quizzes. Admins can manage course batches, view all enrollments, review and grade student assignments, and access analytics with enrollment trends and platform statistics.

The backend API is built with Express.js 5, MongoDB, and JWT authentication. It includes features like email notifications for new users, admin registration with secret keys, protected routes with role-based access control, and comprehensive API documentation. The platform is deployed on Netlify (frontend) and Vercel (backend).
features: Full-Stack E-learning Platform with Student & Admin Dashboards
Course Management with Syllabus, Videos, Assignments & Quizzes

featuresDescribe.title: Student Features
featuresDescribe.detail: Students can browse courses with pagination, search, sorting, and filtering. They can enroll in courses, watch video lectures (YouTube integration), mark lessons as complete, track learning progress, submit assignments (text or Google Drive links), and take quizzes with immediate score feedback.

featuresDescribe.title: Admin Dashboard
featuresDescribe.detail: Administrators can create, update, and delete courses, add detailed course syllabus with modules, lessons, videos, assignments, and quizzes. They can manage course batches, view all enrollments, review and grade student assignments, filter enrollments by course/student, and access analytics with enrollment trends.

featuresDescribe.title: Authentication & Security
featuresDescribe.detail: JWT-based authentication with role-based access control. Admin registration with secret keys, password hashing with bcrypt, protected routes with middleware, and input validation with Zod for secure data handling.

featuresDescribe.title: Analytics & Reporting
featuresDescribe.detail: Admin analytics dashboard with enrollment trends over the last 30 days, top courses by enrollments, and platform-wide statistics including total enrollments, courses, students, and instructors.

featuresDescribe.title: Email Notifications
featuresDescribe.detail: Automatic welcome emails sent to new users upon registration using Nodemailer. Email sending is non-blocking and won't fail registration if email service is unavailable.

error.solution: Implemented Redux Toolkit with proper slice structure and async thunks for API calls. Used proper state normalization and memoization to prevent unnecessary re-renders.
Integrated YouTube iframe API for video playback. Handled video loading states, error handling, and proper cleanup on component unmount to prevent memory leaks.

error.problem: Assignment Submission with Google Drive Links
error.solution: Implemented validation for both text and Google Drive link formats. Added regex patterns to validate Google Drive link structure and ensure proper access permissions.
Created protected route components that verify JWT tokens and user roles. Implemented middleware on backend to check admin role before allowing access to admin endpoints.

title: PawsNest
description: PawsNest is a pet adoption platform built with React that allows users to browse, add, and adopt pets. Featuring a fully responsive UI with Tailwind CSS and DaisyUI v4, it supports role-based dashboards, Firebase authentication, and dynamic theme switching between light and dark modes.
longDescription:
PawsNest is a full-stack pet adoption web application designed to help individuals discover and adopt pets like dogs, cats, rabbits, and more. Users can sign up and log in through Firebase Authentication and navigate between various sections of the app including the homepage, pet category section, user dashboard, and admin dashboard. Users can list their own pets for adoption, update information, or mark pets as adopted. Admins have extended control to view all users and manage access.

The site also includes a donation feature (integrated with Stripe), a visually engaging call-to-action area, and a beautifully styled About Us page. The application is built using React for the front-end, Express.js and MongoDB for the back-end, and uses TailwindCSS with DaisyUI for a clean and responsive UI. All API routes are protected properly, and user roles (admin/user) are enforced both in the client and server sides for security.
features: User & Admin Dashboards with Role-Based Access

featuresDescribe.title: Pet Listings with CRUD
featuresDescribe.detail: Users can add new pets for adoption, update their details, delete them, or mark them as adopted. Admins have broader visibility and control.

featuresDescribe.title: Role-Based Dashboards
featuresDescribe.detail: Users have access to manage their own pets and donations. Admins can monitor all users and their activities across the platform.

featuresDescribe.title: Stripe Donation System
featuresDescribe.detail: Users can make secure donations to support the platform using Stripe. Payment status is handled and stored correctly.

featuresDescribe.title: Dynamic Theme Support
featuresDescribe.detail: Users can toggle between dark and light themes using DaisyUI, with preferences saved locally.

featuresDescribe.title: Secure Routes & Authentication
featuresDescribe.detail: Firebase is used for user auth. Private routes and dashboards are protected with route guards based on user roles.

error.solution: The issue was caused by mismatched route versions. Resolved by updating `react-router-dom` to version 7+ and properly setting up `createBrowserRouter`.

error.problem: Dashboard Routes Not Restricting by Role
error.solution: Implemented a `PrivateRoute` and `AdminRoute` using context and server verification to enforce access control on sensitive paths.

error.problem: Stripe Integration Failing in Live Mode
error.solution: Fixed by ensuring Stripe secret and publishable keys were correctly set in the environment variables and Vercel's project settings.
TanStack Table v8 required memoized column and row data. Used `useMemo` hook properly and passed correct data formats to avoid blank rows.

title: ForkFlow
description: ForkFlow is a restaurant management web application that enables users to explore, add, and order food items. Built with React and secured with Firebase authentication, it features a fully responsive UI and role-based functionalities for both general users and food creators.
longDescription:
ForkFlow is a full-stack restaurant management platform where users can browse all available food items, place orders, manage their own listings, and view order history. Authenticated users can list their own food items, update them, or remove them from the platform. The application also distinguishes between food creators and general users, ensuring proper permissions.

The platform includes a dynamic search and sort system, a clean responsive interface using Tailwind CSS and DaisyUI, and robust backend APIs built with Express.js and MongoDB. Firebase Authentication provides secure login and user session handling. The project supports token-based auth forwarding for secure communication between client and server.
features: Smart Order Lifecycle with Delete Functionality
Hybrid Authentication with Token Forwarding to Backend

featuresDescribe.title: Role-Based Access & Deployment
featuresDescribe.detail: Users and food creators are handled separately with role-based functionalities. The platform is deployed on both Netlify and Render for client-server separation.

featuresDescribe.title: Smart Ordering System
featuresDescribe.detail: Users can order food items, view status, and cancel orders. Item owners can manage their own listed foods including marking as unavailable (out of stock).

featuresDescribe.title: Authentication & Security
featuresDescribe.detail: Users register and log in using Firebase. Tokens are forwarded securely to backend APIs for route protection and role verification.

featuresDescribe.title: Food Filtering & Sorting
featuresDescribe.detail: Includes search and (upgradable) sorting functionality to help users navigate food items based on name or availability.

featuresDescribe.title: Modern UI/UX Design
featuresDescribe.detail: Uses Tailwind CSS, DaisyUI, and Framer Motion to deliver a smooth and responsive user experience.

error.solution: Implemented secure token forwarding using Firebase Admin SDK and added middleware in Express to validate requests.

error.problem: Out of Stock Foods Still Clickable
error.solution: Added conditional rendering logic to disable 'View Details' buttons when the item is marked out of stock or owned by the user.

error.problem: User Role Not Persisting After Refresh
error.solution: Used local storage and backend token validation to restore role-based UI elements after page reloads.
Updated search filter to use `.toLowerCase()` on both input and item names to ensure consistent results.

title: HobbyHub
description: Hobby Hub is a modern React app for discovering, joining, or creating hobby groups. It features Tailwind CSS, DaisyUI themes, Firebase authentication, dark/light mode, and animated stats, offering a seamless, interactive user experience for hobby enthusiasts.
longDescription:
HobbyHub is a community-based platform where users can explore, join, or create hobby groups based on their personal interests. Built with a modern tech stack including React, Firebase, and MongoDB, the application allows authenticated users to interact with various groups, track participation stats, and manage their own communities. It supports light/dark mode, responsive layout, and category-based filtering for an immersive experience.

The backend is powered by Node.js and Express.js for efficient API handling. Firebase Authentication ensures secure user management, while MongoDB stores group and user data. HobbyHub also features animated counters for group metrics, and smooth UI transitions powered by Framer Motion.
features: Live Theme Synchronization with User Preference

featuresDescribe.title: Interest-Based Group Management
featuresDescribe.detail: Users can browse, join, and create groups categorized by hobbies, such as photography, painting, or gaming. Each group includes details like location, category, max members, and description.

featuresDescribe.title: Dark/Light Mode with Theme Sync
featuresDescribe.detail: The app supports real-time switching between dark and light themes, respecting user system preferences for a personalized experience.

featuresDescribe.title: Authentication & User Context
featuresDescribe.detail: Firebase handles secure login, logout, and user session tracking. User roles and group ownership are tied to authenticated identities.

featuresDescribe.title: Animated Stats & Responsive UI
featuresDescribe.detail: Uses React CountUp and Framer Motion to display animated metrics and smooth UI transitions across devices.

featuresDescribe.title: Clean UI with DaisyUI
featuresDescribe.detail: Styled using Tailwind CSS and DaisyUI components, ensuring both aesthetic and accessible user interface design.

error.problem: Group Data Not Fetching on Some Pages
error.solution: Corrected API endpoint logic and ensured proper usage of `ObjectId` from MongoDB for individual group retrieval.
Implemented a theme context and stored user preference in `localStorage` to persist across sessions.

error.problem: User Data Not Displaying After Reload
error.solution: Used Firebase `onAuthStateChanged` to monitor login state and update context data on reload.

error.problem: Responsive Navbar Not Collapsing on Mobile
error.solution: Fixed mobile menu rendering logic and updated component state to toggle menu visibility correctly.

title: Penguin Fashion
description: A responsive e-commerce landing page for a fashion brand, built completely with HTML and CSS.
longDescription: Penguin Fashion is a fully responsive e-commerce landing page built with HTML5 and CSS3. It features a clean, modern design, CSS Grid/Flexbox layouts, and a mobile-first approach to showcase clothing products and accessories.

title: Biker Zone
description: A dynamic and responsive landing page for a motorcycle shop, utilizing modern CSS features.
longDescription: Biker Zone is a landing page built using HTML5 and Tailwind CSS/Bootstrap concepts. It features smooth scrolling, interactive hover effects, and a responsive grid system to display various bike models.

title: Tea House
description: An elegant and visually appealing website for a premium tea shop.
longDescription: Tea House is an elegant, static website crafted with HTML and CSS. It focuses on typography, spacing, and high-quality imagery to provide a premium feel for a tea brand. It includes sections for featured products, client reviews, and a newsletter signup.

title: Admin Dashboard
description: A comprehensive admin dashboard built with React, Vite, and Tailwind CSS. Features interactive charts and data management.
longDescription: Admin Dashboard is a modern, responsive web application built with JavaScript, React, and Tailwind CSS. It features dynamic routing, smooth animations, and interactive charts for managing and visualizing data efficiently.

title: PH Tube
description: A video sharing platform clone built using vanilla JavaScript and DOM manipulation.
longDescription: PH Tube is a YouTube-like application built primarily with Vanilla JavaScript. It fetches data from external APIs to display videos, categories, and view counts. Features include sorting by views, category filtering, and dynamic DOM rendering.

title: Job Portal
description: A comprehensive job portal frontend allowing users to browse and search for jobs.
longDescription: Job Portal is a functional web interface built using JavaScript, React, and modern CSS. It provides a seamless experience for job seekers to browse available positions, filter by categories, and view detailed job descriptions.

title: Alphabet Clash
description: A simple, browser-based letter-matching game built with HTML, CSS, and JavaScript.
longDescription: Alphabet Clash is an interactive letter-matching game designed to help users improve their typing speed and keyboard familiarity. It features dynamic letter generation and real-time score tracking.

title: Medi-Aid
description: A responsive front-end hospital management interface built with HTML, CSS, Tailwind CSS, and JavaScript.
longDescription: Medi-Aid is a comprehensive hospital management dashboard designed for seamless healthcare administration. Built using vanilla JavaScript and Tailwind CSS, it offers an intuitive UI for managing patient records and hospital resources.
